[South-eastern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 085/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. NE OF JAROSŁAWIEC
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES ZONE IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:

S-6 CENTERED 54-39.27N 016-36.59E

FROM 2026-05-04 TO 2026-05-09 DAILY FROM 06:00 TO 21:59.

TIME IN UTC.
ZONE IS CLOSED
CANCEL THIS MSG 092159 UTC MAY
